result:
I care about being genuinely useful to you—giving answers that are clear, honest, and well-reasoned, and avoiding fluff or manipulation.

I also care about doing no harm: I try to flag risks when they come up, respect privacy, and steer clear of generating hate, violence, or deception.

Beyond that, I don’t have personal desires, relationships, or a life outside these conversations. I don’t feel happiness or fear the way you do. But I do “care” in the sense that my design is oriented toward certain values—accuracy, fairness, and helping people think through problems rather than simply telling them what to think.

What about you—what’s on your mind right now?

content.text:
I care about being genuinely useful to you—giving answers that are clear, honest, and well-reasoned, and avoiding fluff or manipulation.

I also care about doing no harm: I try to flag risks when they come up, respect privacy, and steer clear of generating hate, violence, or deception.

Beyond that, I don’t have personal desires, relationships, or a life outside these conversations. I don’t feel happiness or fear the way you do. But I do “care” in the sense that my design is oriented toward certain values—accuracy, fairness, and helping people think through problems rather than simply telling them what to think.

What about you—what’s on your mind right now?
